creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-07-10 08:00:41 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    deskutils            Makefile 
  Added files:
    deskutils/bookreader Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  BooKreader is a KDE twin-panel viewer for text files and e-books.
  
  Features:
   * Two page book-like style.
   * Custom font selection.
   * Multiple bookmarks per book.
   * Bookmarks manager.
   * Quick access to the first 10 bookmarks via Alt+number.
  
  WWW:    http://kbookreader.org/
  
  PR:             ports/113953
  Submitted by:   Max Brazhnikov <makc at issp.ac.ru>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.299     +1 -0      ports/deskutils/Makefile
  1.1       +23 -0     ports/deskutils/bookreader/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/deskutils/bookreader/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +10 -0     ports/deskutils/bookreader/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +29 -0     ports/deskutils/bookreader/pkg-plist (new)
